headline: Should You Buy, Sell, or Hold KLA Stock Before Q3 Earnings?

headline: Michael Burry Just Did Another 'Big Short' — As Historic Chip Stock Rally Finally Snaps
summary: Michael Burry disclosed January 2027 puts on SOXX struck at $330. The chip ETF snapped its longest-ever rally — and 7 constituents report earnings this week.

headline: UBS Lifts PT on KLA Corporation (KLAC) Ahead of Quarterly Earnings
summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is one of the best booming stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 21, UBS lifted the price target on KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) to $1,835 from $1,575 while reaffirming a Neutral rating on the shares. The firm updated its model on the stock ahead of the quarterly earnings report. KLA […]

headline: SHOC: Concentrated Bet On The Semiconductor Supercycle
summary: The Strive US Semiconductor ETF offers concentrated exposure to leading US semiconductor stocks, with the top 10 holdings comprising 75% of assets. Learn more about the SHOC ETF here.
